doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar protocol exists, and its purported waiver of B&P §6125 unauthorized-practice rules and elimination of pre-filing attorney review contradict California law and the State Bar's actual authority.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" exists; the State Bar/LSTFC has no authority to waive UPL under B&P §6125 or authorize non-attorney drafting without pre-filing attorney review, and these provisions contradict California law.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar protocol exists, and its purported waiver of B&P §6125 unauthorized-practice rules and elimination of pre-filing attorney review contradict California law and the State Bar's actual authority.
